summary: Excellent audience recording captures a smoking early‑79 set highlighted by an epic 15‑minute Sugaree, blazing Scarlet Begonias > Fire and a soaring The Other One.
review: The Joani Walker audience tape delivers crystal‑clear sound that makes listeners feel right in the Civic Center, while the performance itself is on fire – a marathon Sugaree, a blistering Scarlet Begonias into Fire, and an inspiring run through The Other One. Reviewers rave about the immersive “being there” vibe and note Brent Mydland’s first‑night entrance during Sugaree, making this a must‑listen early‑79 document.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer scores (average 4.5), multiple mentions of superb sound quality and standout songs; both show and recording are praised.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape recorded by Joani Walker; described as crisp, immersive and “awesome” with B+‑level fidelity, no major noise or drop‑outs noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set flows tightly with high energy typical of early‑79 shows; transitions into the long Sugaree and the closing fire sequence are highlighted as especially seamless.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Band described as “on” and performance praised, implying strong Garcia guitar work.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland makes his entrance 11 minutes into Sugaree, noted as a memorable moment.
